_comment: Weekly per-role telemetry. Copy to heartbeat-tasks/role-telemetry-weekly.json to activate; install plist via heartbeat-tasks/scripts/generate-plist.py role-telemetry-weekly --install. Posts to #agent-stream every Monday 09:00 PT.
description: Runs scripts/role-telemetry-report.ts over the last 7 days and posts the table to #agent-stream. Surfaces per-(agent, runtime) cost, error rate, loop rate so Codex quality drift is visible without manual checks. Pairs with D5.2 Phase 1 CLI.
